title: DNSKEY
helpOutput:
Usage: dnskey [<options>] <domain>

  Look up DNSKEY records for a domain.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to look up DNSKEY records for
output:
[

    "Flags": "256 (ZSK (Zone Signing Key))",
    "Protocol": "3",
    "Algorithm": "13 (ECDSAP256SHA256)",
    "Key Tag": "34505",
    "Key Length": "512 bits",

  },
